chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 958 of 2016 CP D 959 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.21239/2022 2. For orders on CMA No.9995/2022 3. For orders on CMA No.9996/2022 4. For hearing of CMA No.4360/2019 5. For hearing of main case 03.03.2025 Mr. Abdul Wajid Wyne, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh These petitions assail notices issued by the concerned authority for removal of encroachment. These matters are pending since 2016. The entire adjudication proceedings is at a standstill. While the petitioners remained at liberty to respond to the relevant notices before the issuing authority no case is made out for direct recourse to writ jurisdiction. These petitions are found to be misconceived and dismissed. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
